text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Right, I think I'll get the zaru soba again today.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Edo girls eat with class. A quick dip in the sauce
and it's down the hatch. Just like this!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Whazzat?! My nose is... ah, ah... ah,
ACHOO!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Argh! I drenched the entire plate!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Now I won't be able to taste the soba at all! What
a waste!
